channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Can Yogurt Help Prevent Colon Cancer?
Common Walking Mistakes (and How to Fix Them)
item.description: Walking is a nearly perfect, low-impact exercise. But the wrong shoes, pace, or routine can sideline your progress fast -- and may even lead to injury...

item.title: Cryoprobe improves diagnostic yield compared with forceps in bronchoscopic lung biopsy
item.description: 1. Transbronchial biopsy performed with a cryoprobe demonstrated a significantly higher diagnostic yield compared to conventional forceps biopsy in pa...

item.title: Guideline-based lymph node sampling is not associated with increased postoperative complications in lung cancer
item.description: 1. Lymph node sampling with the 3 + 1 rule was not associated with increased postoperative complications after lung cancer resection. Evidence Rating ...
